message:
chore(tmux): remove obsolete pane title reproduction test

Removes session_repro_test.go which was created to reproduce and verify
a bug where colons in pane titles caused GetPanes to misparse tmux output.

The underlying issue has been fixed and the fix is covered by the main
test suite. This standalone reproduction test was a temporary debugging
artifact that is no longer needed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
